  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           commercial.software.xml 
  Log:
  PR:     www/149571
  
  Add PixInsight to the commercial software list.  From their website:
  
  "PixInsight is an advanced, modular image processing software platform designed
  specifically for the demanding requirements of astrophotography and other
  technical imaging fields."
  
  Requested by:   Juan Conejero (info att pixinsight dott com)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.25      +16 -2     www/share/sgml/commercial.software.xml
